source_name: Code4rena Noya Findings and Analysis Report (2024-04)
finding_title: It is possible to open insolvent position in Silo connector, due to missing check in borrow function
summary: NOYA uses Connectors to interact with different protocols - deposit, borrow, repay, withdraw. One of the protocols is Silo through the SiloConnector.
root_cause: missing validation or protection in It is possible to open insolvent position in Silo connector, due to missing check in borrow function, leaving the affected path without the required safety check
broken_invariants: user exit paths must remain available and value-preserving under the root cause: missing validation or protection in It is possible to open insolvent position in Silo connector, due to missing check in borrow function, leaving the affected path without the required safety check
users must retain a reliable exit path unless an explicitly designed and validated pause or restriction is active
state changes must remain internally consistent across all affected accounting buckets and external integrations
attack_preconditions: the affected component is deployed or configured in the way described by the final report
the report-described user, keeper, vault, connector, oracle, or liquidation flow is reachable in the audited code version
attacker_capability: external user, keeper, liquidator, vault participant, or protocol-integrated actor able to trigger the affected flow
trigger_actions: execute the report-described function sequence or state transition
observe mispricing, accounting drift, value loss, fund lock, or denial of service

impact.description: NOYA uses Connectors to interact with different protocols - deposit, borrow, repay, withdraw. One of the protocols is Silo through the SiloConnector.

why_not_higher: already classified as High in the final C4 report
why_not_lower: included as a validated High/Medium C4 finding with public report evidence and affected code/finding references
common_false_positive_angles: verify the same component and configuration are in scope
check whether the issue is reachable by an untrusted or economically motivated actor
confirm the impact is more than a view-only mismatch, dust loss, or privileged-only misconfiguration
mitigations: Add solvency check in the borrow function. function borrow(address siloToken, address bToken, uint256 amount) external onlyManager nonReentrant { ISilo silo = ISilo(siloRepository.getSilo(siloToken)); silo.borrow(bToken, amount); + if (!SolvencyV2.isSolvent(silo, address(this), minimumHealthFactor)) { + revert IConnector_LowHealthFactor(0); + } _updateTokenInRegistry(bToken); emit Borrow(siloToken, bToken, amount); }
